email.subject: More detail on the payroll export failure
email.body: Steps to reproduce: open the payroll variance report, select March 2026, click Export to CSV, and the totals double on row 18.

name: follow-up adds environment and affected group

email.subject: Additional scope for the payroll issue
email.body: This is production only and only affects the Riga finance managers group. Sandbox users do not see the discrepancy.

email.subject: Please prioritise before payroll close
email.body: Please prioritise this before Friday's payroll close because the corrected report is needed for board reporting.

email.subject: Thanks for taking this
email.body: Thanks for taking this on. We are still seeing the same totals issue already described in the ticket.

name: vague reply with no substantive delta

email.subject: Still seeing it
email.body: Still seeing it on my side.
